payload.last_assistant_message:
The implementation is already complete from the prior commit (`6affb50`).

**Summary:**

- Added `--merch-card-collection-header-filter-height: 66px` and `--merch-card-collection-header-search-min-height: 66px` to the `merch-card-collection-header.plans` selector in `web-components/src/variants/plans.css.js`
- These variables increase the header height from the default 44px to 66px (~50% increase)
- Propagates automatically to the filter button, sort button (inherits filter height), and search input
- `node --check` passes with no syntax errors

**Files changed:** `web-components/src/variants/plans.css.js` — 2 lines added (committed in `6affb50`)
